chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Transfer App. No. S – 16 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection No.2 at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.1297/2023 (151 CPC) 18.12.2023 None present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, this transfer application is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
